title: Acceptance
doc_html:
Art. 3289.  Acceptance

A contract of mortgage need not be signed by the mortgagee, whose consent is presumed and whose acceptance may be tacit.

Acts 1991, No. 652, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
